title: Menu Buttons of Stone
description: Makes the buttons on the menus look even more like Stone.
body:
The buttons on Minecraft's menus look a lot like stone, so this pack makes them look even more like Stone by giving them Jappa's Stone texture. Theoretically has some mod support.

**Features:**

* Retextures buttons and some other interactable UI elements to look more like Stone and be stylistically more consistent with each other.
* Has support for Mod Menu and mods that use Spruce UI (though this support has not been tested since game version 1.18.2).

**What's the difference between FULL and LITE?**

Older versions of this pack came in two variants, FULL and LITE: The FULL variant had compatibility with game versions all the way back to 1.15, but had occasional issues with other resource packs. The LITE variant had no such issues, but only supported game versions back to 1.20.2, as the current version does.

**List of Mods with Known(?) Support:**

* Mod Menu
* Chunks Fade In
* CIT Resewn
* MidnightControls
* Presence Footsteps
* Sound Physics Remastered

**If there's a mod you want to see supported or you spot an unknown issue, please tell me! Feedback is greatly appreciated!**
